Off Calendar Mar-28-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nancy E. Guzan appearing in propria persona 563-1757, opposing the motion

RULING:
Defendant did not notify moving party of her intention to appear in court today. Tentative ruling adopted -- PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NEVADA's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS -- GRANTED -- no opposition filed. (DAG/301/JU) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
